message:
🐛 Force all audio through FFmpeg software decoder (ad=lavc) (#76)

- Use ad=lavc instead of ad=lavc:eac3,lavc:ac3 to ensure ALL audio
  codecs use FFmpeg software decoder, bypassing AudioToolbox entirely
- Increase probe size to 10MB for reliable detection of non-standard
  MPEG-TS codec tags like 0x0087 (EAC-3)
- Fixes silent audio on EAC-3 surround streams from IPTV providers

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
